_comment: Pterodactyl Egg for Nanobot AI Gateway - Uses Python, clones from https://github.com/KCCHDEV/nanobot-nagamicloud
name: Nanobot AI Gateway
author: nanobot contributors
description: Nanobot - Ultra-lightweight personal AI assistant with multi-channel support (Telegram, Discord, Slack, etc.). Clones from KCCHDEV/nanobot-nagamicloud and uses Python.
startup: if [ -d .git ] && [ "{{AUTO_UPDATE}}" = "1" ]; then git pull && pip install -e .; fi; if [ ! -d nanobot ] || [ ! -f pyproject.toml ]; then git clone --depth 1 {{GIT_REPO}} . && pip install -e .; fi; nanobot gateway --port {{SERVER_PORT}} --config {{NANOBOT_CONFIG}}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
cd /home/container
if [ ! -d "nanobot" ] || [ ! -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
  git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/KCCHDEV/nanobot-nagamicloud .
fi
pip install -e .

variables.name: Config Path
variables.description: Path to nanobot config.json. Use /home/container/config.json to store config in server files.

variables.name: Git Repository
variables.description: Git URL to clone. Default: KCCHDEV/nanobot-nagamicloud.
